title: Small-cap technology stocks with best and worst quant ratings
content:
As the fourth-quarter earnings season winds down, investors are turning their attention to updated quant ratings following the latest round of corporate results.

The quant scores provide a snapshot of how companies rank across key factors such as valuation, growth, profitability, momentum, and revisions after reporting their quarterly performance.

Below is a snapshot of small-cap technology companies with market capitalizations between $30 million and $2 billion, highlighting those with the highest and lowest quant ratings after the earnings season, underscoring the stocks that strengthened their fundamentals as well as those that lagged.

Top-quant rated stocks:

Ichor Holdings (ICHR [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ICHR]), Quant rating: 4.97 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ICHR/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Buy

RF Industries (RFIL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/RFIL]), Quant rating: 4.93 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/RFIL/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Buy

Coda Octopus Group (CODA [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CODA]), Quant rating: 4.92 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CODA/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Buy

Amtech Systems (ASYS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ASYS]), Quant rating: 4.90 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ASYS/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Buy

Mitek Systems (MITK [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MITK]), Quant rating: 4.86 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MITK/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Buy

Bottom quant rated stocks:

Blaize (BZAI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BZAI]), Quant rating: 1.01 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BZAI/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Sell

reAlpha Tech (AIRE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/AIRE]), Quant rating: 1.01 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/AIRE/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Sell

Similarweb (SMWB [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SMWB]), Quant rating: 1.03 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SMWB/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Sell

PAR Technology (PAR [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PAR]), Quant rating: 1.04 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PAR/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Sell

Sequans Communications (SQNS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SQNS]), Quant rating: 1.04 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SQNS/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Sell
